description:
Listen to the new album, Shawn, out now: https://shawn.lnk.to/album
Featuring Heart of Gold, out now: https://Shawn.lnk.to/HeartofGold

If you or someone you know is struggling or in crisis, help is available. Call or text 988 or visit 988lifeline.org for more info and resources. Outside North America? Visit findahelpline.com for local support.
 
Follow Shawn: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shawnmendes
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@shawnmendes
Twitter: https://x.com/ShawnMendes
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ShawnMendesOfficial
Snap: https://www.snapchat.com/add/shawnmendes
Website: https://www.shawnmendesofficial.com/#/
 
Directed by Connor Brashier & Anthony Wilson (Father & Son)
Production Company: Studio Sands
Executive Producer: Will Harbert
Executive Producer: Ryan Kincade
Executive Producer: Shawn Mendes
Line Producer: Sabrina Alvarez

Director of Photography: Tanner Deutsch
Camera Operator: Anthony Wilson

Edited by: Troy Charbonnet
Color House: Ethos Studio
Colorist: Sam Howells

1st AC: Nile Garcia
1st AC: Liam Nary
Loader: Gabriel Contreras

Gaffer: David Alexander
Best Electric: Godfred Sedano
Electric: Luis Uchoa Chavez
Key Grip: Lulu Larrazolo López
Best Grip: Kelly Ortiz
Grip: Zachary Logounov

Production Designer: Josefine Cardoni
Head of Production: Karam Jones
Stylist: Kristi Kruser
Styling Assistant: Christopher Contaldi
Tailor: Anthony Garcia

Shot On: Kodak 16mm Film
Film Processing: Fotokem

PA: Jonnathan Pintado
PA: Debora Amiliay
PA: Jaymie Stempfel

Studio: Babe Studios
Camera: Technological Cinevideo Services
Grip & Electric: Matria Rentals
Grip: VSNY
Backdrop: Schmidli’s Backdrops
Production Van: Buena Vista Road
Production Truck: Edge Auto Rentals 
 
LYRICS

Ooo-ooo-ooo-ooo
Honestly
It’s been a while since I’ve thought of you
In the end we didn’t talk much
I didn’t know what you were going through
I’m sorry that I wasn’t there, to hug your mama at the funeral
Brian said he broke down, but he promised it was beautiful
When we were young
We didn’t care
We shot for the stars
I see you up there
You had a heart of gold (yea!)
You had a heart of gold
You left too soon
It was out of your control, underneath your skin and bones
You had a heart of gold
I didn’t cry, I didn’t even feel the pain
And then it hit me all at once
When we talked about you yesterday
When we were young (when we were young)
We didn’t care (we didn’t care)
We shot for the stars (shot for the stars)
I see you up there
You had a heart of gold (yea!)
You had a heart of gold
You left too soon
It was out of your control, underneath your skin and bones
You had a heart of gold
When we were young
We didn’t care
We shot for the stars
I see you up there
You had a heart of gold
When we were young (ooo, ohh)
We didn’t care (we didn’t care)
We shot for the stars
I see you up there
You had a heart of gold

#ShawnMendes #Shawn #HeartofGold

Music video by Shawn Mendes performing Heart of Gold.© 2024 Island Records, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc.
